script: echo '===== SERVICE STATUS =====' && systemctl status aixa-bot.service aixa-responder.service --no-pager -n 5 2>&1 | grep -E 'Loaded|Active|Main PID|Memory|Tasks' && echo && echo '===== HOME DIR =====' && ls -la /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/ 2>/dev/null | head -20 && echo && echo '===== RECENT LOG (bot, last 30 lines) =====' && journalctl -u aixa-bot.service -n 30 --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -30 && echo && echo '===== RECENT LOG (responder, last 30 lines) =====' && journalctl -u aixa-responder.service -n 30 --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -30 && echo && echo '===== ERROR COUNT LAST 24H =====' && echo -n 'aixa-bot errors:       ' && journalctl -u aixa-bot.service --since '24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -ciE 'error|exception|traceback|fail|denied' && echo -n 'aixa-responder errors: ' && journalctl -u aixa-responder.service --since '24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -ciE 'error|exception|traceback|fail|denied' && echo && echo '===== INBOUND/OUTBOUND ACTIVITY LAST 24H =====' && echo -n 'aixa-bot inbound:  ' && journalctl -u aixa-bot.service --since '24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -ciE 'inbound|received|activity|POST /api/messages' && echo -n 'aixa-bot outbound: ' && journalctl -u aixa-bot.service --since '24 hours ago' --no-pager 2>/dev/null | grep -ciE 'outbound|sent|reply|response sent'
